summary: Replace jittery free dragging with a fixed feedback capsule, a vertically movable right-edge tab, and double-click pause/resume.
scope: Keep the collapse button on the right side of the expanded capsule and remove expanded-window dragging.
Collapse directly to a right-edge tab with a rounded left end and square screen-side edge.
Move the mini tab vertically with absolute AppKit mouse coordinates and restore the default frame on double-click.
Pause or resume recognition by double-clicking the expanded status content; keep a red paused indicator visible.
validation: Release app build and strict codesign verification passed
notes: Pause stops camera capture, MediaPipe, active gestures, and system event output without persisting across app restarts.
macos-v0.5.0 remains the rollback point before this interaction correction.
